title: millionco/react-doctor
friendlyTitle: React Doctor checks React code made by AI agents
summary: React Doctor is a TypeScript project for finding quality and correctness problems in React code, with a focus on catching patterns commonly produced by coding agents. It was the strongest AI-adjacent repository in the day’s GitHub Trending collection, with about 13.8k stars at review time.
friendlySummary: React Doctor looks for problems in React code, including mistakes that AI coding tools can make.
whyItMatters: Use it as an automated quality gate for agent-written or human-written React changes, especially before review or deployment. It can help teams turn common frontend mistakes into repeatable checks.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to check a React project before you ship changes, whether the code was written by a person or an AI tool.
